response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile apps; while they have diverse technical experience, there is no evidence of leadership in cloud compute systems or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as mandated.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Proven experience building open-source infrastructure and developer tooling
Active mentor and educator with multiple workshops and community contributions
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of C++ experience; C++ usage appears minimal and outdated
Lacks clear experience in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or hardware architecture
No evidence of technical leadership in cloud/DevOps teams or ownership of large-scale infrastructure projects
